category.name: zoo.event.caravan
category.item: I'm on my way to a reserve where they want to increase the population of - %species%. Can you help me? I'll lend you a pair of - %species% for 120 hours. For %amount% of %species% babies, you'll get one adult.
Great! You now have at least 5 babies in your inventory. Quickly exchange them with me for one adult Orangutan!
Great! You really helped me a lot! Now I will take the cubs to the reserve and release them into the wild there. Thank you very much and see you next time!
The animal mobile is back on its way to the reserve, bringing with it two animals you borrowed. You can find your newborn babies in your inventory.

category.name: zoo.event.caravan.tooltip
category.item: You have %count% hours left to swap cubs.
Move the Orangutan babies to inventory.
